subcategory: 3D globe visualization with dotted wireframe pattern
use_cases: Hero section background for SaaS landing pages requiring a global or tech aesthetic
Decorative visualization element for fintech trading platforms
Background component for developer tools and network-themed interfaces
Ambient visual element for media and content platforms
Interactive globe display for data visualization dashboards
ai_summary: A 3D rotating wireframe globe component featuring a dotted pattern overlay, built with D3.js geoOrthographic projection and rendered via Canvas API. The globe auto-rotates continuously with responsive sizing that adapts to container and viewport dimensions. Supports high-DPI displays through devicePixelRatio scaling and uses React hooks for lifecycle management.
